agencies.metaDescription: Directory of verified football player representation agencies on 'BallersHub. Access each agency's official player roster.

comoValidamos.metaDescription: 'BallersHub validation flow: every critical change to a profile is reviewed by humans, cross-checked against 10+ sports sources (Transfermarkt, Sofascore, FBref…) and verified by AI agents (Gemini, Claude, ChatGPT) before going live.

success.title: Subscription cancelled
success.intro: Done. We won't send any more marketing emails to
success.fallback: You'll keep receiving transactional emails (password recovery, confirmations, etc.) because they are required to use the platform.

error.title: Invalid link
error.defaultMessage: The unsubscribe link is invalid or expired.
error.contact: If you want to unsubscribe, email us at <email>info@ballershub.co</email> and we'll handle it.

noToken.title: Unsubscribe
noToken.description: To unsubscribe, open the last email we sent you and click “unsubscribe here” at the bottom. That link carries a unique signed token for your address.
noToken.contact: If you can't find the email, email us at <email>info@ballershub.co</email>.
